title: Amtech G1525 280mm (11") Plastering trowel with soft grip
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: With a 280mm (11") hardened and tempered carbon steel blade, this plastering trowel has a soft grip handle for added comfort
STEEL BODY: Durable construction provides strength for long-term performance
SIZE CAPACITY: 11 inch / 280 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Trowel See more
